summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Reset All, Guardian, Quality Gates, and Night Manager bug fixes. All 43 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright - Reset All clears state correctly, SEEDING badges appear after reset+start, engine modal shows correct fields.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility)

passed_tests: Reset All endpoint returns 200 with success message
Reset All clears PF to None (not computed yet)
Reset All clears accuracy to None
Reset All clears trades_today to 0
Reset All clears kitty to $10 (base_unit)
Reset All clears consecutive_losses to 0
Reset All sets is_seeding to True
Reset All sets night_manager_veto to False
Reset All sets status to STOPPED
Reset All persists clean state to MongoDB (verified via engine detail endpoint)
Single engine reset endpoint works
Single engine reset clears state properly
Engines in seed mode after Reset All + Start All
Seeding engines have badge='SEEDING'
Seeding engines have can_trade=False
Seed progress increases over time (0% -> 10% -> 20%)
Guardian tracks consecutive_losses field on all engines
Paused engines have can_trade=False
Engines with <5 trades not blocked by quality gates
Engine summary has night_manager_veto field (boolean)
Engine detail has night_manager_veto field
Night Manager run endpoint returns veto_active field
Engines have current_position_size field
Reset sets position_size to base unit ($10)
Full Reset -> Start flow works correctly
Stats show zero trades and P&L after reset
critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: None - system uses simulated price data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for Reset All, Guardian, Quality Gates, and Night Manager all verified working. Key behaviors: (1) Reset All clears PF/accuracy/trades/kitty/consecutive_losses and sets is_seeding=True, (2) Reset persists to MongoDB, (3) Guardian clears recovery counters on reset, (4) Seed mode lasts 20 ticks (~40 seconds), (5) Quality gates arm after 5 trades, (6) Night Manager veto field exists and affects position sizing. IB Broker falls back to MOCK mode.

mocked_api.Interactive Brokers: Falls back to mock order execution (broker_client.py)
